Off Calendar Feb-18-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ADELLE CHABLE'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is granted in part. Plaintiff has leave to change the name of the defendant and delete causes of action 5-7. The remainder of the motion is denied because the proposed amendments are futile. Plaintiff cannot allege the age harassment and age discrimination causes of action because they are not related to or likely to be discovered during the investigation of the claims listed in her FEHA charge. See Okoli v. Lockheed Technical Operations Co., (1995) 36 Cal.App.4th 1607, 1615 ("a complaint alleging race discrimination is neither 'like or related to' nor likely to be discovered in a 'reasonable' investigation of a charge of sex discrimination."). The motion is denied as to adding Mr. Gomez as a defendant. Plaintiff was obligated to bring suit against him within one year of receiving the right to sue notice. See Yurick v. Sup. Crt. (1989) 209 Cal.App.3d 1116; Gov't 12965(b). Plaintiff has not filed suit against him within that time period. CCP 474 and the relation back doctrine do not apply to this case. Plaintiff fails to show that she was genuinely ignorant of his identity or the facts that created liability against him. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR #11185 (302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Set For Trial On Mar-02-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Continued To Dec-23-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF ADELLE CHABLE'S Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint is continued December 23, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 26, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/ehg
